apps/ai-assistant.json.title: AI Assistant
apps/ai-assistant.json.description: AI-powered chat interface to modify your WordPress to your liking. Bring your own key or use a local LLM
apps/ai-assistant.json.author: Alex Kirk

apps/chat-to-blog.json.title: Chat to Blog
apps/chat-to-blog.json.description: Import media from Beeper chats and create blog posts. Requires Beeper Desktop running.
apps/chat-to-blog.json.author: Alex Kirk

apps/post-collection.json.title: Collect Posts from the Web
apps/post-collection.json.description: Use the Post Collection Plugin to save articles from around the web
apps/post-collection.json.author: Alex Kirk

apps/personal-crm.json.title: Personal CRM
apps/personal-crm.json.description: Manage your contacts and relationships directly from WordPress
apps/personal-crm.json.author: Alex Kirk

apps/rss-reader.json.title: RSS Reader
apps/rss-reader.json.description: Follow friends and consume their content in your WordPress
apps/rss-reader.json.author: Alex Kirk

apps/memex.json.title: Memex
apps/memex.json.description: Turn WordPress into a note-taking platform with bi-directional [[wiki-links]], automatic backlinks, daily notes, and tags. Import notes from Obsidian, Notion, Evernote, or Roam Research with one click.
apps/memex.json.author: Alex Kirk
